collections.name: users
rules: allow read, write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == document;

collections.name: carbonInputs
rules: allow read: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId;
allow create: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.userId;
allow update: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.userId;
allow delete: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId;

collections.name: ecoActions
rules: allow read: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId;
allow create: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.userId;
allow update: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.userId;
allow delete: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId;
